This [Jawor County](/wiki/Jawor_County "Jawor County") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=W%C4%85dro%C5%BCe_Ma%C5%82e&action=edit).

[[vɔnˈdrɔʐɛ ˈmawɛ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a village in the administrative district of [Gmina Wądroże Wielkie](/wiki/Gmina_W%C4%85dro%C5%BCe_Wielkie "Gmina Wądroże Wielkie"), within [Jawor County](/wiki/Jawor_County "Jawor County"), [Lower Silesian Voivodeship](/wiki/Lower_Silesian_Voivodeship "Lower Silesian Voivodeship"), in south-western Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1)

["Główny Urząd Statystyczny"](https://eteryt.stat.gov.pl/eTeryt/rejestr_teryt/udostepnianie_danych/baza_teryt/uzytkownicy_indywidualni/wyszukiwanie/wyszukiwanie.aspx?contrast=default) [Central Statistical Office] (in Polish). To search: Select "Miejscowości (SIMC)" tab, select "fragment (min. 3 znaki)" (*minimum 3 characters*), enter town name in the field below, click "WYSZUKAJ" (*Search*).

**Wądroże Małe** [[vɔnˈdrɔʐɛ ˈmawɛ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a village in the administrative district of [Gmina Wądroże Wielkie](/wiki/Gmina_W%C4%85dro%C5%BCe_Wielkie "Gmina Wądroże Wielkie"), within [Jawor County](/wiki/Jawor_County "Jawor County"), [Lower Silesian Voivodeship](/wiki/Lower_Silesian_Voivodeship "Lower Silesian Voivodeship"), in south-western Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1)
